tools.name: check_ai_status
tools.description: Check the current operational status of AI services tracked by Prismix. Returns status indicator (operational/degraded/outage), active incident count, and 30-day uptime. Covers 75+ services: OpenAI, Anthropic, Cursor, Mistral, Perplexity, Google AI, and more. Pass a service name/id to filter, or omi

tools.name: list_ai_services
tools.description: List all 75+ AI services tracked by Prismix with their current status. Returns service ID, name, category, and operational indicator.

tools.name: get_incident_history
tools.description: Get the recent incident history (last 30 days) for a specific AI service — past outages and degradations with impact level, start time, and resolution/duration. Useful for answering "has Anthropic been reliable lately?" or "how often does Cursor go down?". Also returns the 30-day uptime percentage a
